title: FSH_Task_Object
description: Canonical task contract for the FSH Command Center. All adapters must accept and return this structure. Version 1.0.0 — baseline schema.

schema_version.description: Semver string. All adapters must reject tasks with unsupported schema versions.

pillar.description: Business pillar this task belongs to. Controls default routing and compliance rules.

objective.description: Human-readable task objective. Used in approval notifications and audit trail.

input_artifacts.description: Artifact IDs or URLs that are CONSUMED by this task (mutated or processed).

required_outputs.description: Expected output artifact types or identifiers.

approval_level.description: 0=no gate, 1=notify only, 2=require explicit human approval before external action.

execution_engine.description: Primary runtime adapter to route this task to.

storage_targets.description: Where to persist artifacts. Postgres is always written first (synchronous primary).

deadline.description: Soft deadline — operator alert if task is not completed by this time.

compliance_flags.description: Compliance requirements. Tasks with any flag here must pass through compliance review.

missing_fields: task_type — referenced in Gridline workflow but absent here; causes Phase 1 validation failures
priority — no queue ordering without this field
parent_task_id — subtask chains not possible without this
idempotency_key — required for financial/external action retry safety
expires_at — hard expiry differs from soft deadline; Gridline deals have hard expiry windows
context_artifacts — read-only reference artifacts differ from consumed input_artifacts
_review_notes.upgrade_path: See task_schema_v1.0.1.json for corrected schema addressing all P0 gaps
